allow: Bash(curl -s https://blackbear-api.kindhill-9a9eea44.italynorth.azurecontainerapps.io/swagger/v1/swagger.json 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=list\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(paths\) if 'feedback' in p.lower\(\) or 'content' in p.lower\(\) or \('venues' in p.lower\(\) and 'public' in p.lower\(\)\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s https://blackbear-api.kindhill-9a9eea44.italynorth.azurecontainerapps.io/swagger/v1/swagger.json 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\) if 'availability' in p.lower\(\) or 'zones' in p.lower\(\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s https://blackbear-api.kindhill-9a9eea44.italynorth.azurecontainerapps.io/api/public/Venues | python -c "import sys,json; venues=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'ID:{v[\\"id\\"]:3d} | {v[\\"name\\"]:15s} | {str\(v.get\(\\"type\\",\\"\\"\)\):12s} | lat={v[\\"latitude\\"]} lng={v[\\"longitude\\"]}'\) for v in venues]" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s https://blackbear-api.kindhill-9a9eea44.italynorth.azurecontainerapps.io/api/public/Venues | python -c "import sys,json; venues=json.load\(sys.stdin\); total=len\(venues\); with_coords=sum\(1 for v in venues if v['latitude'] and v['longitude']\); print\(f'Total: {total} venues, With coordinates: {with_coords}'\); print\(\); [print\(f'  {v[\\"name\\"]:15s} | {str\(v.get\(\\"type\\",\\"\\"\)\):12s} | {v[\\"latitude\\"]:.4f}, {v[\\"longitude\\"]:.4f}'\) for v in venues if v['latitude']]" 2>&1)
